articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.description: The U.S. and Israel killed Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in strikes on Saturday. President Donald Trump called on Iranians to “take back” their country.
articles.title: Live updates: Iran's future unclear after Supreme Leader Khamenei killed in US-Israeli attack

articles.author: Adil Jawad, Munir Ahmed
articles.description: Authorities say at least nine people were killed in clashes with police on Sunday after hundreds of protesters stormed the U.S. Consulate in the Pakistani port city of Karachi. The violence came after the United States and Israel attacked Iran and killed the Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Police said the protesters have been dispersed, and the situation is under control. Karachi is the largest city in Pakistan and the protesters were minority Shiites in the predominantly Sunni Muslim country. Other protests were planned in cities across the country.
articles.title: At least 9 killed as Shiites storm US Consulate in Pakistan over killing of Iran's supreme leader

articles.author: Jon Gambrell
articles.description: In Iran the supreme leader is the heart of a complex power-sharing theocracy and has final say over all matters of state. The death of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei after decades as head of state raises paramount questions about the Iran's future. It kicks off a complex succession process that could see a temporary leadership council assume power until Iran's 88-member Assembly of Experts appoints a new supreme leader. Deliberations about succession take place far from the public eye, making it hard to gauge who may be top contenders,
articles.title: How will Iran's next supreme leader be chosen?

articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.description: Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei succeeded the founder of the Islamic Revolution in 1989.
articles.title: Photos showing life of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei

articles.description: Khamenei was killed in a major attack on Iran launched by Israel and the United States, throwing the future of the Islamic Republic into doubt and raising the risk of regional instability.
articles.title: Mourners take to streets of Tehran following confirmation of Khamenei's death

articles.description: World leaders are responding cautiously after U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran raised fears of a wider war.
articles.title: World leaders react to US and Israeli strikes on Iran as fears grow of a wider war

articles.description: In a rare and colorful exchange, the representatives of the United States and Iran exchanged warnings and direct rebuffs toward the end of the emergency session on Iran as military aggression between their countries risked spilling into a regional war.
articles.title: Iranian and US diplomats clash in tense exchanges at UN Security Council meeting
